question: Does anyone in your family have a history of serious illness? (Cancer, heart disease, diabetes, genetic diseases)
label: Family medical history

question: Do you currently have a serious illness? (Cancer, brain/neurological tumors, severe heart/liver/lung diseases)
label: Serious illness

question: Do you have regular health check-ups?
label: Skipping check-ups

question: Do you smoke?
label: Smoking

question: Do you drink alcohol/beer?
label: Drinking alcohol

question: Do you use addictive substances?
label: Substance abuse

question: Average daily sleep hours
label: Sleep deprivation

question: Do you drink enough 2L (≈ 8 glasses) of water daily?
label: Dehydration

question: How many meals do you eat per day?
label: Irregular meals

question: How many hours do you sit continuously per day?
label: Sedentary lifestyle

question: Do you eat breakfast?
label: Skipping breakfast

question: Do you consume fast food or sugary/carbonated drinks?
label: Junk food & sugary drinks

question: Do your daily meals include vegetables?
label: Lack of vegetables

question: Does your diet include a lot of salt/fish sauce?
label: High salt intake

question: Do you often eat canned or processed foods?
label: Processed foods

question: Are you a vegetarian/vegan?
label: Unbalanced diet

question: Do you often eat after 9 PM?
label: Late-night eating

question: Do you eat until you are overfull?
label: Overeating

question: Do you often skip meals?
label: Skipping meals

question: Do you use electronic devices while eating?
label: Distracted eating

question: Do you cook at home or eat out/order in?
label: Eating out too much

question: Is your food often greasy/oily?
label: Greasy food

question: Is your food often spicy or hot?
label: Spicy food

question: Do you often eat fruit?
label: Lack of fruits

question: Do you walk regularly?
label: Lack of walking

question: Do you practice Yoga or stretching exercises?
label: Lack of stretching

question: Do you go to the gym?
label: Physical inactivity

question: Do you play sports?
label: Lack of sports

question: Do you use health tracking devices (e.g., Smartwatch)?
label: Ignoring health metrics

question: Do you experience shortness of breath or chest pain during heavy exercise?
label: Cardiovascular issues

question: Do you use phones/computers frequently?
label: Excessive screen time

question: Do you go swimming often?
label: Lack of physical activity

question: Do you spend more time outdoors or indoors?
label: Staying indoors too much

question: Do you often go traveling or on picnics?
label: Lack of recreation

question: Do you sleep before 11 PM?
label: Staying up late

question: Do you take afternoon naps?
label: Poor rest habits

question: Do you snore while sleeping?
label: Sleep apnea/Snoring

question: Do you feel tired when waking up?
label: Poor sleep quality

question: Do you often have nightmares?
label: Mental stress (Nightmares)

question: Do you travel frequently between countries?
label: Frequent jet lag

question: Which country do you mainly live in?
label: Environmental factors

question: Are you currently working at a company?
label: Work-related stress

question: Is your work based at an office or at home?
label: Sedentary work

question: Does school/work cause you significant pressure?
label: High stress levels

question: Where do you live?
label: Polluted living area

question: What is your main mode of transport?
label: Traffic risks

question: Do you often wear a seatbelt in a car?
label: Not wearing seatbelts

question: Do you wear a helmet on a motorbike?
label: Not wearing helmets

question: Are there many factories/plants near your area?
label: Industrial pollution

question: Is there a lot of noise around your home/workplace?
label: Noise pollution

question: Do you often feel lonely?
label: Loneliness & Depression
